caption: The video begins with a static shot of the Manipal Hospitals logo, prominently displayed against a plain white background. The logo features the text "manipalhospitals" in a clean, modern font, with "manipal" in blue and "hospitals" in green. Below the main text, the tagline "LIFE'S ON" is written in smaller, uppercase letters, accompanied by a small red cross symbol. This initial frame remains unchanged for a few seconds, allowing viewers to fully absorb the branding and message of the hospital. The simplicity and clarity of the design emphasize the professional and trustworthy nature of the institution. As the video progresses, there is no noticeable change or transition, maintaining the focus on the logo and its associated message.
